reference_provenance.project: ADF-Copy / ADF-Drive (DIY open-source Teensy Amiga controller)
reference_provenance.baseline: UFT V1 adfcopyhardwareprovider.h — DELETED by MF-169/P1.17
reference_provenance.note: RESP_* + clock + geometry are recalled-grade; ADFC_CMD_* opcodes are needs-source (only survive as UFT comments, authoritative header deleted) — those rows are UNVERIFIED.

tiers.usb_ids: recalled (generic PJRC Teensy ID, shared w/ Applesauce)

uft_note: ADF-Copy has NO C-HAL; opcodes are comment/static_assert text only (adfcopyhardwareprovider.h deleted by MF-169). RESP_*, sample-clock and geometry are real constexpr in the .cpp.

cmd_opcodes.detail: needs-source — opcode value only in UFT comments (adfcopyhardwareprovider.h deleted); numeric matches recalled value but not independently checkable
